title: Smoky Lazy Portuguese Pork Roast
description: A hearty, smoky Portuguese-inspired pork roast made with a sweet and savory brine, perfect for a lazy Sunday dinner.

ingredients.name: Worcestershire sauce
ingredients.notes: use the dark version for a deeper flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the apple cider vinegar, brown sugar, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, onion, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the brine.
Add the pork shoulder to the brine and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the pork from the brine and place it in a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot with a lid.
Add the water to the pot and cover it with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 6 hours, or until the pork is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
If desired, garnish with fresh thyme and serve with your choice of sides.
